meaning: n.娉曞紡铔嬬硶,涓撳敭娉曞紡铔嬬硶鐨勫簵
examples: The busy streets in Paris were uneven and caked in thick mud, but there was always a breathtaking sight to see in the shop windows of Patisserie de la Rue de la Paix.
Delia came home with a box of the most delicious patisserie.
In 1996, Patisserie Francaise was forced out after the building's owner died and left the deed to MIT.
Were it not for places like Albiani's and the Patisserie Francaise, I--and countless denizens of academic towns like Cambridge--would be immeasurably poorer.
